name: unifi-protect
description: Manage UniFi Protect — cameras, motion events, smart detections, recordings, snapshots, viewers, and NVR status.
author: Pzharyuk

env.name: UNIFI_HOST
env.description: Your UniFi controller URL, e.g. https://192.168.1.1

env.name: UNIFI_VERIFY_SSL
env.description: Set to true to enforce SSL certificate validation (default: false)
